experiences.title: IT Development Intern
experiences.description: • Developed a python program which was able to predict the cost of vehicle parts within the FEDEBOM Ford database with respect to various attributes within the database. • This involved the process of using Factor Analysis to convert categorical data into numerical data, allowing the use of Multiple Linear Regression to predict the cost of the vehicle parts. • This project was developed within an Agile team environment to facilitate collaboration between multiple department managers and team members.
